Update: Update available! Click here to start it.
Tooltip_SteamShowMiniProfile: Fetch Steam mini profile HTML in the background and show it after hovering an account avatar for one second.
Tooltip_SteamShowAvatarFrame: Download the equipped avatar frame from the mini profile page and draw it on top of the profile picture.
Steam_StartSilent: Open Steam to task tray on switch (Start Steam with '-silent')
Tooltip_Login: Log in with the selected account
Tooltip_AddNew: Clear session and sign in as a new account
Tooltip_SaveCurrent: Save the current session as a named account
Tooltip_Launch: Start the platform without switching accounts
Tooltip_LaunchAfterSwitch: Start the platform after switching accounts to {name}
Toast_StatsReportFailed: Could not load the statistics report.
Modal_SaveCurrent_Body: Enter a display name for this account:
Settings_SteamCollectInfo: Collect Steam Profile Picture & VAC Status from Steam
Settings_SteamAPIKey_Note: Setting an API key will make the Limited indicator (yellow border) show for accounts that are Community Banned instead.
Settings_LaunchArguments_Hint: Optional extra command-line launch options. For example: '-dev' or '-novid'.
Settings_ResetConfirm: Reset all settings for {platform} to their defaults?
Settings_TrayMax: Max number of accounts to remember:
Settings_ExtraPlatformsDisabled: Disabled platforms. Click to enable them.
Settings_ExtraPlatformsEnabled: Visible platforms. Click to disable them.
Security_SetPasswordIntro: This password is required to open and access the app.
Security_SetPasswordEncryptionHint: It does not encrypt saved/cached account data by itself. To encrypt saved/cached account data, enable the checkbox in settings after setting this password.
Security_CurrentPasswordBody: Enter your current app password to continue.
Security_RemovePasswordEncryptedBody: Enter your current app password. Encrypted saved/cached account data will be decrypted before the password is removed.
Security_EnableEncryptionBody: Enter your current app password to encrypt saved/cached account data.
Security_DisableEncryptionBody: Enter your current app password to decrypt saved/cached account data.
Security_WeakPasswordBody: This password may be easy to guess. You can continue, but encryption strength depends on this password.
Security_Reset_Hint: Forgotten-password reset keeps settings and plaintext metadata, but deletes encrypted saved account sessions.
Security_Reset_Body: This removes the app password and deletes encrypted saved account sessions. Settings and plaintext account metadata are preserved.
Security_Reset_Done: App password and encrypted sessions were reset.
Security_InterruptedRestorePending: A previous account restore was interrupted. Repair the temporary restore state, then switch to the intended account again if needed.
Security_InterruptedRestore_Body: A previous account restore was interrupted before the app closed. Recommended repair clears temporary restore state and marks the interrupted restore as handled. After repair, switch to the intended account again if the platform is not in the expected account.
Security_QuarantineRetryBody: Enter the old app password for this quarantine. Valid blobs will be imported back into plaintext saved account data.
Security_QuarantineDeleteBody: This permanently deletes the quarantined encrypted blobs and their recovery material.
Security_Locked_Body: Enter your app password to access accounts.
Settings_ShowSteamSwitcher: Show Steam's account switcher (Do NOT use this or it may break the TcNo Account Switcher)
Settings_NoPlatforms: There are currently no platforms enabled. Please tick optional platforms below to enable them, or uncheck disabled platforms.
Settings_ShowLastUsed: Show last used time on account tiles
Command_ClearAccountTagsConfirm: Remove all tags from every {platform} account?
Command_TagVisibleAccountsPrompt: Enter a tag to apply to {count} visible account(s). Existing tags are reused.
Command_ClearAllImagesConfirm: Clear cached profile images for every {platform} account?
Settings_PreviewCss: This is the CSS preview page. You can view some elements that pop up in the program and see what they look like with your theme. This page is useful for those creating themes!
Stats_ModalShareEnabled: These statistics are shared anonymously and are included in the public totals.
Stats_ModalShareDisabled: These statistics are NOT shared anonymously and are NOT included in the public totals.
Stats_MetricsAffiliationNote: NOTE: This program is not affiliated or endorsed by this website or service.
Cleaning_ImportantInfo:
Clicking a button will delete the related file(s) from your Steam installation.
Deleting loginusers.vdf will result in this account switcher showing no accounts.
You will need to login to them using Steam to get them back.
Cleaning_Understand: I understand what these buttons do.
SteamAdvanced_LogPlaceholder: Output from each action will appear here.
SteamAdvanced_ClosedSteam: Closed Steam (or Steam was not running).
Tooltip_PortableMode: Pressing this will move the TcNo Account Switcher folder right next to the .exe for portable installs.
Toast_PlaceShortcutFiles: A folder is opening. Place game shortcuts in that folder, and restart the account switcher.
Toast_ProtocolEnabled: This program will now respond to tcno:\\ in Windows
Toast_ProtocolDisabled: This program will no longer respond to tcno:\\
Toast_OfflineModeEnabled: Offline mode is on: no outbound network requests from the app.
Toast_OfflineModeDisabled: Offline mode is off: profile and API refresh can use the network again.
Toast_OfflineModeNoLinks: Offline mode is on: open the link from your browser manually if needed.
Toast_RestartAsAdmin: Please start as Admin and try again.
Toast_ShortcutImportUnsupported: Only .lnk and .url files can be dropped here
Overlay_UserDataMove: Copying user data to the new location…
Overlay_UserDataMoveRestarting: Restarting to finish moving user data…
Toast_SettingsCopied: Settings successfully copied to current account.
Toast_GameDataRestored: Successfully restored game data for this account.
Toast_NoValidSteamId: Unable to find a valid Steam ID.
Toast_Steam_VacCleared: VAC status for accounts was cleared
Toast_NoFindGameBackup: Unable to find backup game data folder for this account.
Toast_GameBackupDone: Game data folder backed up successfully: {folderLocation}
Toast_PlatformsJsonUpdateFound: A newer Platforms.json is available (v{version}). Downloading…
Toast_FailedStatsLoad: Failed to load GameStats.json! Please verify this file exists.
Toast_GameStatsLoadFail: Failed to get game stats from web for {Game}
Toast_UpdateCheckFail: Could not reach https://tcno.co/ to check for updates. This message will show once a day.
Toast_SameAccount: Cannot copy files to/from the same account. Try a different account, or see Wiki for more info.
Toast_FoundExeViaShortcut: We found the installed path from a Start Menu shortcut. Please verify it's location by clicking Settings now.
Modal_Crowdin_Info:
Here's everyone who helped translate this software.
Users with languages next to them helped a lot in translation (proofreader role).
Modal_Title_MoveUserdata: Select location to move user data
Modal_GameVars_Header: Please enter the following details for your {game} account, {username} on {platform}
Modal_Body_MissingPlatformsJson: The Platforms.json file was not found in the TcNo Account Switcher folder next to this program. Choose a file to use, or restore the default list shipped with the app.
Modal_SetBackground:
Select an image, or enter a URL below.
Leave blank and set to reset.
(For more advanced control see the Theming on the Wiki):
Modal_SetUserdata: Enter a folder path below and click set.
Modal_ChangeUsername: Please enter a new username for your account
Modal_SetPassword: Enter a password for the TcNo Account Switcher
Modal_CrashReport_Body:
Looks like we crashed!
Would you like to submit your crash log to help debug and fix issues?

A redacted session action log (file and registry operations) is included automatically. Usernames, IDs, and similar details are removed from the log as best we can before sending.
Toast_UrlAdminErr: You can not run .url files as admin. Try another shortcut type. Launching as normal user.
Status_FailedLog: Action failed. See log for details.
Status_WaitingForMultipleClose: Waiting for {processName} & {count} others to close ({timeout}/{timeLimit} seconds)
Overlay_ProfileImageHint: Please drag and drop an image file for the account: {name}, or click below to select one.
Context_GameData_NoFolders: No installed title has local game data or a saved backup for this account yet.
Title_Settings_TestCss: TcNo Account Switcher - Test CSS Styling
Prompt_RestartAsAdmin:
This program will restart as Admin

Hit "Yes" in UAC when prompted for admin.
Prompt_ForgetAccount:
You are about to forget an account!

What does this mean?

TcNo Account Switcher will also no longer show the account,
until it's signed into again through {platform}, and added to the list.

Your account will remain untouched. It is just forgotten on this computer.

Do you understand?
Prompt_ClearStats:
You are about to clear your statistics!

You can not undo this action.
Tooltip_ShortcutFolder: Open shortcut folder. Place shortcuts in there, and the TcNo Account Switcher to see them.
Tooltip_Backup: Backup config files/folders, as defined in platform settings.
Tooltip_BackupAll: Backup ALL config files/folders, including images and other large files.
Tooltip_ClosingMethod: Combined is best. Close attempts to close directly through a close function and TaskKill uses CMD (Best if combined doesn't work)
Tooltip_StartingMethod: Default is the best. Direct has no control over admin level or UAC. It will start as the same level (or higher - but not lower) than this account switcher
Tooltip_CurrentAccount: You are currently logged into this account.
Settings_PreviewOverlayDropReceivers: Fullscreen receivers and per-account cues shown while dragging profile images or shortcuts. Static previews below match those states.
Toast_CrashReported: A crash report was submitted successfully.
Toast_CrashReportSubmitFailed: Could not submit the crash report.
Stability_ThumbDown: No, the switch did not work
Feedback_Issue_Body: Describe what went wrong and what you expected:
Feedback_Suggestion_Body: Enter an idea, change or fix in detail:
Feedback_AttachLog_Hint: Usernames, IDs, and similar details are removed from the log as best we can before sending.
